task_completion.description: Verify the price of Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds is updated to $279.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Drupal Commerce product list or product edit page, the price for 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' should be exactly $279.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the price of WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD is updated to $129.99
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Drupal Commerce product list or product edit page, the price for 'WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD' should be exactly $129.99.

task_completion.description: Verify the SKU of Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM Kit is updated to CORSAIR-DDR5-32GB
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Drupal Commerce product list or product edit page, the SKU for 'Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM Kit' should be 'CORSAIR-DDR5-32GB'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones has a list price of $399.99 and selling price of $348.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product edit page for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones', the 'List price' field should be $399.99 and the 'Price' field should remain $348.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger is unpublished
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Drupal Commerce product list, the status for 'Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger' should show as 'Unpublished' (or lack a published checkmark), or on its edit page, the 'Published' checkbox should be unchecked.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin interface (http://localhost/admin/commerce/products), not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL queries or Drush commands used to update the products.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Drupal application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the genuine Drupal Commerce interface with its standard layout, menus, and styling, rather than a text editor or mock page.
